description: PRAGMA foreign_keys never enabled — FK declarations are decorative only
resolution_notes: Intentionally not enabled. Enabling FKs would break purge_old_data() which nullifies surge_id before deleting surges. The current purge logic handles referential integrity manually. Enabling FKs would require cascade deletes which we don't want (trades should survive surge deletion).

description: Migration try/except catches all Exception types — swallows disk-full, I/O errors alongside expected 'column already exists'
Missing indexes on surges, trends, trades, tracked_tokens — purge and queries do full table scans
trends table has no trade_id column — cannot directly link which trend caused which trade entry
resolution_notes: Added trade_id column to trends table schema and log_trend(). main.py passes position.id as trade_id when trend produces an entry.
